experience.title: Marketing Manager
responsibilities: Led a team of 5 in developing and executing marketing campaigns across digital platforms.
Utilized Google Analytics to track website performance and optimize SEO strategies.
Implemented CRM software (HubSpot) for lead management and customer engagement.
Developed and analyzed marketing KPIs to measure campaign effectiveness.
Collaborated with designers to create engaging marketing materials.

experience.title: Marketing Strategist
responsibilities: Designed and implemented PPC campaigns that increased lead generation by 30%.
Managed social media advertising strategies that enhanced brand visibility and engagement.
Conducted market research to inform marketing strategies and product development.
Regularly presented marketing performance metrics to stakeholders.

response.summary: Experienced marketing professional with a strong background in digital marketing strategies and project management. Proven track record of leading teams and optimizing marketing initiatives to drive engagement and results.
